/usr/bin/ar qc libcombined_static.a CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/combined_core.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_ct_ops.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_mldsa44_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_mldsa65_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_mldsa87_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_mldsa_core.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_mldsa_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_mlkem768_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_mlkem_core.c.o CMakeFiles/combined_static.dir/libcrux_sha3_portable.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcombined_static.a
